description_long: This helicopter features a streamlined, angular fuselage with a matte dark gray finish and subtle red accents along the rotor blades and tail. The main rotor consists of four long, slender blades with red tips, while the tail rotor is mounted vertically at the end of a narrow tail boom. The cockpit is equipped with large, multi-pane windows that wrap around the front and sides, providing ample visibility for the crew. Underneath the fuselage, there are robust landing skids and visible weapon mounts or equipment pods, suggesting a military or tactical role. The helicopter's exterior is primarily constructed from metal, likely reinforced with composite materials for durability and weight reduction. No visible registration numbers or alphanumeric markings are present on the body.
description: A matte dark gray helicopter with red-accented rotor blades, large cockpit windows, and robust landing skids, featuring a streamlined, tactical design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, main rotor, cockpit windows, and landing skids.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cockpit windows, nose, and symmetrical arrangement of the landing skids and weapon mounts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tail rotor, main rotor, and side-mounted equipment pods.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail boom, vertical tail rotor, and the alignment of the landing skids.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, narrow main rotor blades made of composite material, each with a dark gray base and red tips, extending symmetrically from the rotor hub.
attribute_tail_rotor: A vertical tail rotor with four short blades, also featuring red tips, mounted at the end of the tail boom with no visible protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: Two parallel, tubular landing skids made of metal with a matte dark finish, connected by crossbars and mounted beneath the fuselage for stability.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Multiple large, angular cockpit windows wrapping around the front and sides, framed in black, with a slight tint and no visible markings.
